ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe
ham.body:
Hi team,

I will be out of the office from Monday, 15 May 2026 to Friday, 20 May 2026, returning on Monday, 23 May 2026. During this period, I will have limited access to email. For urgent matters, please contact Sarah Lee at sarah.lee@example.com or the helpdesk.

Best regards,
John

spam.subject: Action Required: QuickBooks Invoice #98765 Overdue – Pay Now!
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

This is an official notice from QuickBooks Inc. Our records indicate that Invoice #98765, dated 01 May 2026, remains unpaid. If the payment is not received within 48 hours, your account will be suspended and you will incur additional fees. Please review the invoice details and submit payment immediately by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
QuickBooks Billing Department
